scripts.dev: bun run sync:workspace && nuxt prepare && nuxt dev
scripts.build: bun run sync:workspace && nuxt prepare && nuxt build && node scripts/postbuild-static.mjs
scripts.generate: bun run sync:workspace && nuxt prepare && nuxt generate && node scripts/postbuild-static.mjs
scripts.twoslash:verify: bun run sync:workspace && nuxt prepare && nuxt-content-twoslash verify
scripts.check: bun run build && bun run twoslash:verify
